plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Nexi Locate needs your location to show nearby places and navigate.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Nexi Locate needs your location to show nearby places.

plugins.cameraPermission: Nexi Locate needs camera access to take photos and record videos of places.
plugins.microphonePermission: Nexi Locate needs microphone access to record audio with videos.
Nexi Locate needs microphone access to record audio for reviews.

plugins.contactsPermission: Nexi Locate needs access to your contacts to share places and invite friends.
